items.title: 1. Say hello
items.text:
Send me a message through my
contact form to tell me all about your
vague plans or wildest dreams.

items.title: 2. Let’s have coffee
items.text:
Or tea. Because I don't really like coffee. No couple is ever the
same, so I'm excited to meet you and hear all about you, your
most questionable habits, and (most importantly) your wedding plans.

items.title: 3. Slay the paperwork monster
items.text:
Or simply sign the contract to
make sure you claim that spot in
my agenda.

items.title: 4. Enjoy the ride
items.text:
I'm happy to help wherever I can, before and during your wedding day. Looking for wedding planner
recommendations? Hit me up. Having a hard time choosing the color of your picnic blanket? I'm a pro.
Forgot how to tie your shoelaces? I've got you. Thirsty? On my way!
